---
id: get-versions-registry-definitions-definition-id-versions-get
title: "Get version history for a definition"
description: "Return all versions of a definition, newest-first (created_at DESC)."
sidebar_label: "Get version history for a definition"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get version history for a definition"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/registry/definitions/{definition_id}/versions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Return all versions of a definition, newest-first (created_at DESC).

Includes deprecation status, meaning_hash, and ir_hash per version.

HTTP 404 — definition not found.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
